title: India's Drastic Improvement Continues
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, India produced approximately 142 billion kilowatt hours of electricity last month. This is down month-on-month by 900 million kilowatt hours (-1%), up year-on-year by 11.1 billion kilowatt hours (9%), and is the largest amount ever produced in the month of June. Electricity production has now increased year-on-year for three straight months.
